title: Total Craft Count
description: This mod shows the total items you'd shift-click to craft, preventing accidental over-crafting.
body:
# NOTICE

## Total Craft Count has been officially archived and will no longer receive updates. Please check out [Total Yield](https://modrinth.com/mod/total-yield).

![Total Craft Count](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/347be12933aa795a00934e45a4ad8a8cc34be376.png)

Accidentally shift-clicked a stack of items you didn't mean to craft? Total Craft Count shows your total count right beside the grid, preventing costly mistakes before they happen.

| **FEATURES** |
|-|

- Preview Container: Adds a small preview container to the right of both the Player Inventory crafting grid (2×2) and the Crafting Table (3×3).
- Total Output: Displays the output item and the total number of items you would receive from a shift-click, given your current ingredients.
- Smart Visibility: The container only appears when your ingredients cover more than one batch. Single-batch setups keep the UI clean and unchanged.
- Vanilla Style: The count text matches the style of vanilla item stack counters. White text, drop shadow, anchored to the bottom-right of the slot.

| **HOW TO USE** |
|-|

No setup needed. Open your inventory or a crafting table, place items in the crafting grid, and the preview container will appear automatically on the right side of the GUI whenever more than one batch is possible. The number updates in real time as you add or remove ingredients.

| **REQUIREMENTS** |
|-|

*   Fabric Loader
*   Fabric API

| **CLIENT-SIDE ONLY** |
|-|

All functionality is done client-side and is compatible with vanilla servers.

| **FREE & OPEN SOURCE** |
|-|

This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by:

*   Leaving a rating/review
*   Sharing it with friends
*   Reporting any bugs you find
